Hi! I do not think we have met. I am James Carter, the people director here in Australia. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too, James. I am Murielle. I work as an HR business partner.
Great! What do you do at Minerva Foods?
I am an HR manager. I am in charge of a small team for the corporate areas.
Nice. Where are you based?
Our headquarters is based in São Paulo. We have operations in Australia and Chile too.
Wonderful. We work with your team on the headcount review. Let us stay in touch.
Thank you, James. Let us keep in touch after the call.
Hi, I am Murielle. Nice to meet you.
I work as an HR business partner at Minerva Foods.
I am in charge of the HR team for the corporate areas.
My biggest challenge is the Australian accent.
It was great meeting you. Let us keep in touch.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the global HR alignment call. My name is James, and I am the people director here in Australia. We start at nine o'clock, Sydney time. Today we talk about three things: our headcount, the turnover numbers, and the new roster for the local team. We have partners on the call from Brazil, Chile, and the Middle East. Please introduce yourself when you speak, and say your role and your country. If you need help with anything, send me a message. Thank you, and let's have a great meeting.

Hi Murielle, this is Sarah from the corporate team. I call about the people review next week. The meeting is on Thursday at two o'clock, and it is in English. Our Australian colleagues join the call too. Please bring your turnover numbers and a short update about your team. It is a quick meeting, about thirty minutes. Send me a message when you are free, and we keep in touch. Thank you. Talk soon.
